tests.name: GitHistoryAnalyzer getCommitList should parse git log output and return commits oldest-first
GitHistoryAnalyzer getCommitList should handle commit messages that contain pipe characters
GitHistoryAnalyzer getCommitList should detect the current branch dynamically
GitHistoryAnalyzer getCommitList should return empty array for empty git log
GitHistoryAnalyzer getGraphDataForCommit should return cached graph data on cache hit
GitHistoryAnalyzer getGraphDataForCommit should return empty graph data on cache miss
GitHistoryAnalyzer getGraphDataForCommit should return empty graph data when storageUri is undefined
GitHistoryAnalyzer indexHistory should fully analyze the first commit and diff-analyze subsequent commits
GitHistoryAnalyzer indexHistory should handle Added files in diff
GitHistoryAnalyzer indexHistory should handle Deleted files in diff
GitHistoryAnalyzer indexHistory should handle Modified files in diff by re-analyzing
GitHistoryAnalyzer indexHistory should handle Renamed files by updating node id and repointing edges
GitHistoryAnalyzer exclude patterns should filter out excluded files during full commit analysis
GitHistoryAnalyzer exclude patterns should skip excluded files when handling Added in diff
GitHistoryAnalyzer exclude patterns should work with matchBase option for simple glob patterns
GitHistoryAnalyzer abort signal should stop indexing when abort signal fires
GitHistoryAnalyzer invalidateCache should remove cache directory and clear workspace state
GitHistoryAnalyzer hasCachedTimeline should return false when no cache version is stored
GitHistoryAnalyzer hasCachedTimeline should return true when correct cache version and plugin signature are stored
GitHistoryAnalyzer hasCachedTimeline should return false when cache version does not match
GitHistoryAnalyzer hasCachedTimeline should return false when plugin signature does not match the current registry
GitHistoryAnalyzer getCachedCommitList should return null when no cache exists
GitHistoryAnalyzer getCachedCommitList should return cached commits when cache version and plugin signature match
GitHistoryAnalyzer getCachedCommitList should return null when the cached plugin signature does not match
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze returns null for unsupported files
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze extracts symbols plus import, reexport, require, dynamic-import, and imported-call relations for TypeScript files
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze extracts symbols from arrow function and function expression variable declarations
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze extracts Python imports, symbols, and imported-call relations
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze resolves Python member imports back to the owning module file
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze extracts Rust imports, module declarations, symbols, and imported-call relations
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze extracts Go imports, type declarations, and imported-call relations
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze extracts Java imports, inheritance, and imported-call relations
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze extracts C# imports, type symbols, and inheritance
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze resolves C# local namespace imports and type references after pre-analysis
pipeline/analysis/analyze returns an empty graph when no workspace root is available
pipeline/analysis/analyze uses only default and plugin filters when user filters are omitted
pipeline/analysis/analyze discovers, analyzes, caches, and emits lifecycle events
pipeline/analysis/analyze shows the discovery warning when the file limit is reached
routing/analyze returns normalized core results when matching plugins do not analyze files
routing/analyze continues merging after a plugin failure
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/csharpIndex/analyze clears the workspace index when no C# files are present
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/csharpIndex/analyze indexes only files with a C# runtime and stores the completed workspace index
